description: Anthropic Messages streaming with the 2025-08-25 code execution server tool (text editor + bash variants). Validates provider-executed tool-input streaming, tool-call emission at block stop, and tool-result mapping.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: Server tool names like text_editor_code_execution and bash_code_execution are normalized to toolName=code_execution in v3 parts, while the streamed input JSON includes a `type` field describing the specific provider tool.
